title: Editorial Title Slide
notes: Open with the core premise and one line of context.
bodyHtml:
Building presentations
that feel deliberate

Warm paper tones, serif-led headlines, and restrained motion create a calmer, more premium deck.

title: Three-Part Framework
notes: Explain each card briefly and move on before the slide becomes too verbal.
bodyHtml:
Three principles

1

One idea per slide.

2

Use notes for detail.

3

Keep print export ready.

title: Quote Slide
notes: Pause after the quote and let it land.
bodyHtml:
"The deck should feel like a point of view, not a template."

Keep the surface simple so the argument carries the weight.
